# wc2026.cool — World Cup 2026 prediction game

> Free, no sign-up. Bilingual (English / 中文). Public forecasting data + a 10,000-run Monte Carlo model, refreshed hourly. For entertainment only — virtual points, nothing redeemable.

## Key pages
- https://www.wc2026.cool/ — home: today's matches and predictions
- https://www.wc2026.cool/forecast — advancement and title probabilities (live model)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/calculator — third-place qualification scenario calculator
- https://www.wc2026.cool/rules — 2026 World Cup format and qualification rules explained (48 teams, 12 groups, 8 best thirds)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/calculator/group/a — Group A: who advances (groups a through l)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/watch — official broadcast guide
- https://www.wc2026.cool/sitemap.xml — full index of every team and match page (48 teams + all fixtures, with per-team chance to advance/win and per-match prediction + most likely scores)

## 中文页面 / Chinese pages (zh-Hans)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/ — 首页：今日比赛与预测
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/forecast — 出线概率与夺冠概率（实时模型）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/forecast/best-thirds — 最佳第三名排名（前 8 晋级）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/calculator — 第三名出线场景计算器
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/rules — 2026 世界杯赛制与出线规则详解（48 队，12 组，8 个最佳第三名）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/watch — 官方转播观赛指南

## Notes
- All numbers are model estimates for entertainment, not advice.
- Method: team strength ratings + public forecasting data, Poisson score model, 10,000 Monte Carlo runs, 2026 official tie-breakers.
